name: Mining
description: Mining operations require tramp iron removal to reduce crusher and conveyor damage risk.

name: Mineral Processing
description: Mineral processing conveyors need reliable magnetic separation and plant protection.

name: Coal Handling
description: Coal conveyors, transfer points and port handling lines often require suspended magnets.

name: Iron Ore
description: Iron ore applications require careful confirmation of the separation objective and material behaviour.

name: Manganese Ore
description: Manganese ore handling can involve heavy loads, abrasive material and crusher protection needs.

name: Chrome Ore
description: Chrome ore conveyors need robust magnetic equipment selected for actual burden depth and layout.

name: Gold Mining
description: Gold mining conveyors may require tramp iron control before crushing and processing equipment.

name: Quarry and Aggregates
description: Quarry and aggregate lines focus on crusher protection and metal contamination control.

name: Recycling
description: Recycling lines use magnetic equipment for ferrous recovery and material stream cleanup.

name: Cement
description: Cement plants may require magnetic protection for raw material handling and conveyors.

name: Power Plants
description: Power plant fuel handling conveyors require reliable equipment protection and maintenance planning.

name: Conveyor Systems
description: Conveyor systems are the core installation scenario for suspended magnetic separators.

name: Ports and Bulk Terminals
description: Port conveyors and terminals need corrosion-aware and continuous-duty equipment review.

name: Food Processing
description: Food and dry material streams may use bars, grids, plates and grates for ferrous control.
